title: Rich Sweet Irish Lamb Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful one-pot Irish dish featuring tender lamb, sweet pecan nuts, and a hint of yuzu-cure, all in a rich and comforting stew.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb cubes and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it starts to soften, about 3 minutes.
Add the chopped carrots and potatoes, and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Stir in the yuzu-cure, salt, and black pepper, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the vegetable broth and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the Dutch oven, and simmer for 1 1/2 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Stir in the chopped pecan nuts and continue to simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with additional pecan nuts if desired.
